scheme_contracts.contract_type: CISA (federal underwriting) — Stage 1 192 MW per IPC approval; scheme records cite ~230 MW; AEMO Gen Info 210 MW

stakeholder_issues.issue: Capacity discrepancy across Stage 1 IPC, scheme record, and AEMO
stakeholder_issues.detail: Three numbers coexist: IPC Stage 1 approval = 192 MW (used for like-for-like cohort total); CIS T1 scheme record = ~230 MW; AEMO Generation Information = 210 MW. The broader Neoen hub envisages up to ~380 MW across staged development. Refresh once DCCEEW publishes consolidated CIS execution data.

timeline_events.title: IPC approval — Stage 1 (192 MW)
timeline_events.detail: NSW Independent Planning Commission approved Stage 1 at 192 MW. Broader Neoen hub envisages up to ~380 MW across staged development.

timeline_events.title: EPBC approval
timeline_events.detail: Federal EPBC Act approval granted Nov 2024.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 1 underwriting awarded
timeline_events.detail: Neoen's Thunderbolt wins CIS Tender 1 underwriting. The CIS contract is cited at ~230 MW in scheme records; the IPC approval covers 192 MW Stage 1; AEMO Generation Information lists 210 MW. Discrepancy reflects mid-development design refinement.
